payload.title: SARIF output for GitHub code-scanning
payload.description: Reviewer: 'you already emit clean JSON — SARIF output so GitHub code-scanning can ingest it.' Add `--format sarif` alongside human/json (crates/trust/src/main.rs + crates/trust-diag/src/lib.rs to_json). Lets a repo wire `trust check --format sarif` into a CI step and get inline annotations / the Security tab without bespoke glue.
